ESTABLISHED IN 2017

ABOUT.

Our Heritage

Our Story.

Founded in 2017, On A Roll was born from a simple idea: why not combine the art of sushi with the soul of gourmet sliders? Located on a quaint, happening street right downtown Windsor, we've been serving up original, creative dishes ever since.

An easy walk from Caesar's casino and the Detroit waterfront, we offer a cozy atmosphere, classic rock & roll vibes and live music on the weekends. The chef's really respect their craft and prepare high quality, fresh and flavourful food that is very well presented.

Since 2017
Locally Owned & Family Operated

Who Knew Sushi & Sliders Went So Well Together?

Located on a quaint, happening street right downtown Windsor. Original, creative dishes and staff that will make you feel like you are hanging out in your living room enjoying a good time. Come by once and we'll greet you by name like old friends.

01

The Craft

Our bartenders are very innovative and knowledgeable as they perfect our trendy and delicious cocktails. If you are lucky, you will witness our amazing local musicians and vocalist who never fail to get the whole restaurant singing along with them.

Explore the menu

Rock & Roll Soul

The atmosphere is cozy yet buzzing and all around contagious. Whether you're looking for a great date spot, girl's night, game night with the boys or somewhere just to go out — On a Roll is the right choice!

The Spirit

Every slider is a study in texture: toasted brioche, premium meats, and house-made sauces. Paired with a rotating selection of local craft beers, it's a symphony of the unexpected. We believe a great meal should feel like your favorite concert — energetic, memorable, and a little bit loud.

The O.R. Collective

TASTE THE REVOLUTION.

Order Now View Menu
ON A ROLL

The intersection of high-fidelity sound and culinary excellence. Good Food. Good Music. Good People. Good Vibes.
